title: davallia divaricata var. dimorpha
intro: Davallia divaricata var. dimorpha, also known as the split-fern or dimorphic davallia, is a type of fern that belongs to the Davallia genus. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Davallia divaricata var. dimorpha include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
